title: Get Your Ass to Mars
headline: Get Your Ass to Mars (Seriously, No Time to Waste)
caption:
For those who understand the urgency of interplanetary travel and the magic of ‘90s sci-fi. Don this shirt and channel your inner Schwarzenegger—because Mars isn't going to invade itself. 

👉 [Get your ass to Mars](https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/get+your+ass+to+mars?idea=5d89cc1fb4b8c76e39170868) 👈 Save this one for later.

#TotalRecall #Arnold #90sSciFi
alt_text: A black t-shirt featuring a quirky graphic referencing the iconic line from the movie Total Recall.

title: Guns Don't Kill People
headline: Innocent until proven armed.
caption:

title: I Can't Feel My Perineum
headline: When Your Ride Doesn’t Just Test Your Limits...
caption:
...but your sensation too. If you’re not feeling it down there after a solid ride, you might want to rethink your seat or stick to yoga. 😂 Grab the tee that sums up that classic feeling: https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/i+can't+feel+my+perineum?idea=5d89cc11b4b8c76e39170242 #CyclingLife #PerineumProblems #NumbRides Save this one for later.
